offer: For construction contractors managing 5–15 projects/month, inefficient equipment maintenance tracking causes unexpected downtime. We provide an automated scheduling system instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient tracking of equipment maintenance leads to unexpected downtime.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to construction contractors with demo video
Community forums for sharing construction tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry for service schedules
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
